import io
import string
import list

fn binary_search(_ nums: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut lo = 0
  mut hi = nums.len() - 1
  mut found: Option<Int> = None
  mut done = false
  while lo <= hi and not done
    let mid = lo + (hi - lo) / 2
    match nums.get(mid)
    when Some(val)
      if val == target
        found = Some(mid)
        done = true
      else if val < target
        lo = mid + 1
      else
        hi = mid - 1
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
  found
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        nums = list.push(nums, n)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let target = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  match binary_search(nums, target)
  when Some(idx)
    print("index=#{idx}")
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end

  Ok(())
end
